Bug / Task Description: The fast anti-entropy diff produces wrong results for two trees of the same shape that differ in a few leaves. When it descends into the children of two internal nodes whose hashes differ, the left and right subtrees of the two trees are mispaired, so changed keys are compared against the wrong positions and the resulting only-local / only-remote / different sets are garbage. The slower full diff is unaffected, so the two paths disagree.
Commit Subject: fix(merkle): pair matching subtrees when descending the diff
